filePurposes.polyfills.js: ES5 polyfill shims: Array.prototype.indexOf, Object.keys, Date.now, String.prototype.trim. Sets __POLYFILLS_READY__ = true as guard.
filePurposes.storage.js: Dual-backend token persistence (localStorage with cookie fallback). Exposes getToken/setToken/clearAll with obfuscated prefix. Sets __STORAGE__.
filePurposes.config.js: SDK configuration exposed via __CONFIG__. Contains API_SALT (x7k9m_2025), API_ENDPOINT, API_VERSION, VERIFY_KEY (double-base64-decoded), FEATURE_ENABLED, SEPARATOR (|), feature flags.
filePurposes.crypto.js: Full MD5 implementation (Rivest constants: 0x67452301, 0xefcdab89, 0x98badcfe, 0x10325476), nonce generator (16-char random hex), hex-to-string. Exposed as __MD5__.
filePurposes.signer.js: Request signing engine: sorts params → builds sign string (k=v&k=v|salt|ts|nonce) → MD5 hash → returns {signature, timestamp, nonce, algorithm, version}. Also verify(). Exposed as __signRequest__.
filePurposes.client.js: API client entry point: checks polyfills+config, reads config/signer/storage, injects cached token, signs params, XHR POST to API_ENDPOINT, caches auth_token/refresh_token on success. Exposed as __sendSignedRequest__.

dependencies.mechanism: globalThis.__CONFIG__ for SALT, ENDPOINT, VERSION, FEATURES

dataFlow: polyfills → config (decodes base64 values: API_SALT=x7k9m_2025, VERIFY_KEY=abc123def456, API_ENDPOINT) → crypto (MD5 + nonce) → storage (localStorage/cookie) → signer reads CONFIG.API_SALT + MD5, builds sign string (sorted k=v&k=v|salt|ts|nonce) → MD5 hash → client reads CONFIG+signer+storage: injects auth_token → signs params → XHR POST to API_ENDPOINT with X-Signature/X-Timestamp/X-Nonce headers → caches tokens on 200 response → returns signature
